solidity-audit.description: HexStrike Solidity Audit MCP — Slither, SWC, Mythril heuristics, read-only on-chain. Primary static analyzer.

foundry.description: Foundry MCP — forge build/test, cast call, anvil. Local compile and PoC verification.

chainstack.description: Chainstack MCP — EVM RPC, indexer, web3 context for addresses and networks.

faro-fino.description: Faro Fino MCP — second-opinion deep scan (Slither/Mythril/Aderyn). Requires Docker image.

plaid-cfo.description: Personal CFO — read-only Plaid (accounts, transactions, holdings, liabilities).
